name: Garlic-Almond Spread
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast almonds in a 325°F oven for 10 minutes.
2. Lower the heat to 275°F and bake the garlic in oil. Cover if needed to prevent browning.
3. Allow the garlic to cool, then blend it with the oil until smooth.
4. Add the cream cheese, sour cream, Worcestershire sauce, and mustard; blend well.
5. Incorporate the nuts, chopped parsley, rosemary, shallots, salt, and pepper; blend again.
6. Transfer the mixture to a mixing bowl.
7. Whip the heavy cream and fold it into the mixture.
8. Chill for 2 hours and serve at room temperature.
